'''âb-b-f-w''' ('''kababfewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yeehaw|yeehaw]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-b-f-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yeehaw|yeehaw]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âb-b-f-w
|-
! Lemma
| kababfewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibabfewoko|thibabfewoko]] || [[word:jibabfewoko|jibabfewoko]] || [[word:shibabfewoko|shibabfewoko]] || [[word:kibabfewoko|kibabfewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubabfewoko|thuthubabfewoko]] || [[word:jujubabfewoko|jujubabfewoko]] || [[word:shushubabfewoko|shushubabfewoko]] || [[word:kukubabfewoko|kukubabfewoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobabfewoko|thobabfewoko]] || [[word:jobabfewoko|jobabfewoko]] || [[word:shobabfewoko|shobabfewoko]] || [[word:kobabfewoko|kobabfewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠbabfewoko|thĂŠbabfewoko]] || [[word:jĂŠbabfewoko|jĂŠbabfewoko]] || [[word:shĂŠbabfewoko|shĂŠbabfewoko]] || [[word:kĂŠbabfewoko|kĂŠbabfewoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thababfewoko|thababfewoko]] || [[word:jababfewoko|jababfewoko]] || [[word:shababfewoko|shababfewoko]] || [[word:kababfewoko|kababfewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thababfewoko|thababfewoko]] || [[word:jababfewoko|jababfewoko]] || [[word:shababfewoko|shababfewoko]] || [[word:kababfewoko|kababfewoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
